'''zhamate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:otherways|otherways]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-m-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:otherways|otherways]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhamate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhamate|zhamate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhamatesher|zhamatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhamatesherĂ«m|zhamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhamatero|zhamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhamateshĂ«|zhamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhamateshĂ«m|zhamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhamatero|gokizhamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhamateshĂ«|gokizhamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhamateshĂ«m|gokizhamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhamankerom|gozhamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhamankeshĂ«|gozhamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhamankeshĂ«m|gozhamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhamankeya|gozhamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhamaterom|zhamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhamatemu|zhamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhamateya|zhamateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhamaterom|gokizhamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhamatemu|gokizhamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhamateya|gokizhamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhamamate|zhamamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhamamatesher|zhamamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhamamatesherĂ«m|zhamamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhamamatero|zhamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhamamateshĂ«|zhamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhamamateshĂ«m|zhamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhamamatero|gokizhamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhamamateshĂ«|gokizhamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhamamateshĂ«m|gokizhamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhamamankerom|gozhamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhamamankeshĂ«|gozhamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhamamankeshĂ«m|gozhamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhamamankeya|gozhamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhamamaterom|zhamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhamamatemu|zhamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhamamateya|zhamamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhamamaterom|gokizhamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhamamatemu|gokizhamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhamamateya|gokizhamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠmĂŠte|zhĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠmĂŠtesher|zhĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠmĂŠtero|zhĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠmĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠmĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠmĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠmĂŠterom|zhĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠmĂŠtemu|zhĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠmĂŠteya|zhĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠmĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠmĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafmafte|zhafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafmaftesher|zhafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafmaftesherĂ«m|zhafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafmaftero|zhafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafmafteshĂ«|zhafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafmafteshĂ«m|zhafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafmaftero|gokizhafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafmafteshĂ«|gokizhafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafmafteshĂ«m|gokizhafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafmafnkerom|gozhafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafmafnkeshĂ«|gozhafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafmafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafmafnkeya|gozhafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafmafterom|zhafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafmaftemu|zhafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafmafteya|zhafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafmafterom|gokizhafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafmaftemu|gokizhafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafmafteya|gokizhafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
